Table 7: leader_lease ---\n1800\t\n1801\t    #[test]\n1802\t    fn leader_lease_acquire_renew_steal() {\n1803\t        let store = test_store();\n1804\t\n1805\t        // Use realistic timestamps based on current time\n1806\t        let now = now_ms();\n1807\t        let t0 = now;\n1808\t        let t1 = now + 15_000;  // +15s (first lease expiration)\n1809\t        let t2 = now + 6_000;   // +6s (renew before expiration)\n1810\t        let t3 = now + 20_000;  // +20s (after lease expired)\n1811\t        let t4 = now + 30_000;  // +30s (new lease expiration)\n1812\t        let t5 = now + 35_000;  // +35s (renewal)\n1813\t\n1814\t        // First acquisition (now=t0, expires=t1)\n1815\t        assert!(store\n1816\t            .try_acquire_leader_lease(\"reshard:idx-1\", \"pod-a\", t1, t0)\n1817\t            .unwrap());\n1818\t\n1819\t        // Same holder can re-acquire before expiration (now=t2 < t1)\n1820\t        assert!(store\n1821\t            .try_acquire_leader_lease(\"reshard:idx-1\", \"pod-a\", t1, t2)\n1822\t            .unwrap());\n1823\t\n1824\t        // Different holder, lease not expired — fails (now=t2, lease=t1)\n1825\t        assert!(!store\n1826\t            .try_acquire_leader_lease(\"reshard:idx-1\", \"pod-b\", t4, t2)\n1827\t            .unwrap());\n1828\t\n1829\t        // Lease expired — different holder can steal (now=t3 > t1)\n1830\t        assert!(store\n1831\t            .try_acquire_leader_lease(\"reshard:idx-1\", \"pod-b\", t4, t3)\n1832\t            .unwrap());\n1833\t\n1834\t        // Renew by current holder\n1835\t        assert!(store.renew_leader_lease(\"reshard:idx-1\", \"pod-b\", t5).unwrap());\n1836\t\n1837\t        // Wrong holder cannot renew\n1838\t        assert!(!store.renew_leader_lease(\"reshard:idx-1\", \"pod-a\", t5).unwrap());\n1839\t\n1840\t        // Get lease\n1841\t        let lease = store.get_leader_lease(\"reshard:idx-1\").unwrap().unwrap();\n1842\t        assert_eq!(lease.holder, \"pod-b\");\n1843\t        assert_eq!(lease.expires_at, t5);\n1844\t    }\n1845\t\n1846\t    // --- Migration idempotency ---\n1847\t\n1848\t    #[test]\n1849\t    fn migration_is_idempotent() {\n1850\t        let store = SqliteTaskStore::open_in_memory().unwrap();\n1851\t        store.migrate().unwrap();\n1852\t\n1853\t        // Insert data to prove it survives re-migration\n1854\t        store\n1855\t            .insert_task(&NewTask {\n1856\t                miroir_id: \"survivor\".to_string(),\n1857\t                created_at: 1,\n1858\t                status: \"enqueued\".to_string(),\n1859\t                node_tasks: HashMap::new(),\n1860\t                error: None,\n1861\t                started_at: None,\n1862\t                finished_at: None,\n1863\t                index_uid: None,\n1864\t                task_type: None,\n1865\t                node_errors: HashMap::new(),\n1866\t            })\n1867\t            .unwrap();\n1868\t\n1869\t        // Run migration again — should be a no-op\n1870\t        store.migrate().unwrap();\n1871\t\n1872\t        // Data still there\n1873\t        assert!(store.get_task(\"survivor\").unwrap().is_some());\n1874\t    }\n1875\t\n1876\t    #[test]\n1877\t    fn schema_version_recorded() {\n1878\t        let store = SqliteTaskStore::open_in_memory().unwrap();\n1879\t        store.migrate().unwrap();\n1880\t\n1881\t        let conn = store.conn.lock().unwrap();\n1882\t        let version: i64 = conn\n1883\t            .query_row(\n1884\t                \"SELECT MAX(version) FROM schema_versions\",\n1885\t                [],\n1886\t                |row| row.get(0),\n1887\t            )\n1888\t            .unwrap();\n1889\t        assert_eq!(version, registry().max_version());\n1890\t    }\n1891\t\n1892\t    // --- Schema version ahead error ---\n1893\t\n1894\t    #[test]\n1895\t    fn schema_version_ahead_fails() {\n1896\t        let dir = tempfile::tempdir().unwrap();\n1897\t        let path = dir.path().join(\"test.db\");\n1898\t\n1899\t        // Create a store with current binary\n1900\t        let store = SqliteTaskStore::open(&path).unwrap();\n1901\t        store.migrate().unwrap();\n1902\t        drop(store);\n1903\t\n1904\t        // Artificially set schema version ahead of binary\n1905\t        let conn = Connection::open(&path).unwrap();\n1906\t        conn.execute(\n1907\t            \"INSERT INTO schema_versions (version, applied_at) VALUES (?1, ?2)\",\n1908\t            params![registry().max_version() + 1, now_ms()],\n1909\t        )\n1910\t        .unwrap();\n1911\t        drop(conn);\n1912\t\n1913\t        // Re-opening should fail with SchemaVersionAhead error\n1914\t        let result = SqliteTaskStore::open(&path).and_then(|s| s.migrate());\n1915\t        assert!(result.is_err());\n1916\t        match result.unwrap_err() {\n1917\t            crate::MiroirError::SchemaVersionAhead {\n1918\t                store_version,\n1919\t                binary_version,\n1920\t            } => {\n1921\t                assert_eq!(store_version, registry().max_version() + 1);\n1922\t                assert_eq!(binary_version, registry().max_version());\n1923\t            }\n1924\t            _ => panic!(\"expected SchemaVersionAhead error\"),\n1925\t        }\n1926\t    }\n1927\t\n1928\t    // fn concurrent_writes_no_deadlock() {\n1958\t        use std::sync::Arc;\n1959\t        use std::thread;\n1960\t\n1961\t        let dir = tempfile::tempdir().unwrap();\n1962\t        let path = dir.path().join(\"concurrent.db\");\n1963\t        let store = Arc::new(SqliteTaskStore::open(&path).unwrap());\n1964\t        store.migrate().unwrap();\n1965\t\n1966\t        let mut handles = vec![];\n1967\t        for i in 0..4 {\n1968\t            let s = Arc::clone(&store);\n1969\t            handles.push(thread::spawn(move || {\n1970\t                let mut nt = HashMap::new();\n1971\t                nt.insert(\"node-0\".to_string(), i as u64);\n1972\t                s.insert_task(&NewTask {\n1973\t                    miroir_id: format!(\"concurrent-{i}\"),\n1974\t                    created_at: i as i64,\n1975\t                    status: \"enqueued\".to_string(),\n1976\t                    node_tasks: nt,\n1977\t                    error: None,\n1978\t                    started_at: None,\n1979\t                    finished_at: None,\n1980\t                    index_uid: None,\n1981\t                    task_type: None,\n1982\t                    node_errors: HashMap::new(),\n1983\t                })\n1984\t                .unwrap();\n1985\t            }));\n1986\t        }\n1987\t\n1988\t        for h in handles {\n1989\t            h.join().unwrap();\n1990\t        }\n1991\t\n1992\t        // All 4 tasks should be there\n1993\t        let all = store.list_tasks(&TaskFilter::default()).unwrap();\n1994\t        assert_eq!(all.len(), 4);\n1995\t    }\n1996\t\n1997\t    // --- Table 8: canaries ---\n1998\t\n1999\t    #[test]\n2000\t    fn #[instrument(skip_all, fields(additions_count))]\n104\t    pub async fn sync_iteration(&self) -> Result<usize> {\n105\t        let coordinator = self.coordinator.read().await;\n106\t        let additions = coordinator.get_all_additions().clone();\n107\t        drop(coordinator);\n108\t\n109\t        let mut jobs_completed = 0;\n110\t\n111\t        for (addition_id, state) in additions {\n112\t            // Only sync additions in Syncing phase\n113\t            if !matches!(state.phase, crate::group_addition::GroupAdditionPhase::Syncing) {\n114\t                continue;\n115\t            }\n116\t\n117\t            // Find pending shards to sync\n118\t            let pending_shards: Vec<_> = state\n119\t                .shard_states\n120\t                .iter()\n121\t                .filter(|(_, s)| matches!(s, crate::group_addition::ShardSyncState::Syncing { .. }))\n122\t                .map(|(shard, s)| (*shard, s.clone()))\n123\t                .collect();\n124\t\n125\t            if pending_shards.is_empty() {\n126\t                continue;\n127\t            }\n128\t\n129\t            // Sync each pending shard\n130\t            for (shard_id, shard_state) in pending_shards {\n131\t                let source_group = match shard_state {\n132\t                    crate::group_addition::ShardSyncState::Syncing { source_group, .. } => {\n133\t                        source_group\n134\t                    }\n135\t                    _ => continue,\n136\t                };\n137\t\n138\t                match self.sync_shard(addition_id, shard_id, source_group).await {\n139\t                    Ok(docs_copied) => {\n140\t                        jobs_completed += 1;\n141\t                        let mut coord = self.coordinator.write().await;\n142\t                        if docs_copied > 0 {\n143\t                            // Update progress\n144\t                            let _ = coord.shard_sync_progress(addition_id, shard_id, docs_copied);\n145\t                        }\n146\t                    }\n147\t                    Err(e) => {\n148\t                        warn!(\n149\t                            addition_id = %addition_id,\n150\t                            shard_id = shard_id.0,\n151\t                            error = %e,\n152\t                            \"Shard sync failed, will retry\"\n153\t                        );\n154\t                    }\n155\t                }\n156\t            }\n157\t        }\n158\t\n159\t        Ok(jobs_completed)\n160\t    }\n161\t\n162\t    /// Sync a single shard from source group to new group.\n163\t    #[instrument(skip_all, fields(addition_id, shard_id, source_group))]\n164\t    async crate::error::MiroirError::Topology(format!(\n183\t                    \"source group {} not found\",\n184\t                    source_group\n185\t                ))\n186\t            })?;\n187\t\n188\t        // Get target group (the new group being added)\n189\t        let target_group_id = {\n190\t            let coord = self.coordinator.read().await;\n191\t            let state addition_id\n195\t                ))\n196\t            })?;\n197\t            state.group_id\n198\t        };\n199\t\n200\t        let target = topology\n201\t            .group(target_group_id)\n202\t            .ok_or_else(|| {\n203\t                crate::error::MiroirError::Topology(format!(\n204\t                    \"target group {} not found\",\n205\t                    target_group_id\n206\t                ))\n207\t            })?;\n208\t\n209\t        // Find healthy nodes in source and target groups\n210\t        let node_map = topology.node_map();\n211\t        let source_healthy = source.healthy_nodes(&node_map);\n212\t        let target_healthy = target.healthy_nodes(&node_map);\n213\t\n214\t        let source_node = source_healthy\n215\t            .first()\n216\t            .ok_or_else(|| {\n217\t                crate::error::MiroirError::Topology(format!(\n218\t                    \"no healthy nodes in source group {}\",\n219\t                    source_group\n220\t                ))\n221\t            })?;\n222\t\n223\t        let target_node = target_healthy\n224\t            .first()\n225\t            .ok_or_else(|| {\n226\t })?;\n231\t\n232\t        let source_node_id = source_node.id.clone();\n233\t        let source_node_address = source_node.address.clone();\n234\t        let target_node_id = let mut offset = 0u32;\n241\t        let mut total_copied = 0u64;\n242\t        let mut has_more = true;\n243\t\n244\t        while has_more {\n245\t            let filter_value = for shard {} from group {}\",\n263\t                    shard_id, source_group\n264\t                ))\n265\t            })?\n266\t            .map_err(|e| {\n267\t                crate::error::MiroirError::Routing(format!(\n268\t                    \"fetch failed for shard {}: {}\",\n269\t                    shard_id, e\n270\t                ))\n271\t            })?;\n272\t\n273\t            // Parse response\n274\t            let results = docs\n275\t                .get(\"results\")\n276\t                .and_then(|v| v.as_array())\n277\t                .ok_or_else(|| {\n278\t                    crate::error::MiroirError::Routing(\n279\t                        \"invalid response: missing results array\".to_string(),\n280\t                    )\n281\t                })?;\n282\t\n283\t            let total = docs.get(\"total\").and_then(|v| v.as_u64()).unwrap_or(0);\n284\t\n285\t            if results.is_empty() {\n286\t                has_more = &target_node_id,\n294\t                    &target_node_address,\n295\t                    &fetch_req.index_uid,\n296\t                    results.clone(),\n297\t                )\n298\t                .await\n299\t                .map_err(|e| {\n300\t                    crate::error::MiroirError::Routing(format!(\n301\t                        \"write failed for shard {}: {}\",\n302\t                        shard_id, e\n303\t                    ))\n304\t                })?;\n305\t\n306\t            let count = results.len() as u64;\n307\t            total_copied += count;\n308\t\n309\t            debug!(\n310\t                addition_id = %addition_id,\n311\t                shard_id = shard_id.0,\n312\t                offset,\n313\t                count,\n314\t                total_copied,\n315\t                total,\n316\t                \"Synced page\"\n317\t            );\n318\t\n319\t            // Check if we're done\n320\t            has_more = (offset as u64 + count) < total;\n321\t            offset += page_size;\n322\t        }\n323\t\n324\t        // Mark shard as complete\n325\t        let mut coord = self.coordinator.write().await;\n326\t        coord\n327\t            .shard_sync_complete(addition_id, shard_id, total_copied)\n328\t            .map_err(|e| {\n329\t                crate::error::MiroirError::Topology(format!(\n330\t                    \"failed to mark shard complete: {}\",\n331\t                    e\n332\t                ))\n333\t            })?;\n334\t\n335\t        info!(\n336\t            addition_id = %addition_id,\n337\t            shard_id = shard_id.0,\n338\t            total_copied,\n339\t            \"Shard sync complete\"\n340\t        );\n341\t\n342\t        Ok(total_copied)\n343\t    }\n344\t\n345\t    /// Check for sync timeout and fail additions that have exceeded the limit.\n346\t    #[instrument(skip_all)]\n347\t    pub async fn check_timeouts(&self) -> Result<()> {\n348\t        let coord = self.coordinator.write().await;\n349\t        let additions = coord.get_all_additions().clone();\n350\t        drop(coord);\n351\t\n352\t        let timeout = Duration::from_secs(3600); // 1 hour default\n353\t\n354\t        for (addition_id, state) in additions {\n355\t            if !matches!(state.phase, crate::group_addition::GroupAdditionPhase::Syncing) {\n356\t                continue;\n357\t            }\n358\t\n359\t            if let Some(started_at) = state.started_at {\n360\t                if started_at.elapsed() > timeout {\n361\t                    warn!(\n362\t                        addition_id = %addition_id,\n363\t                        group_id = state.group_id,\n364\t                        \"Group addition sync timeout\"\n365\t                    );\n366\t\n367\t                    let mut coord = self.coordinator.write().await;\n368\t                    let _ = coord.fail_addition(\n369\t                        addition_id,\n370\t                        format!(\"sync timeout after {:?}\", timeout),\n371\t                    );\n372\t                }\n373\t            }\n374\t        }\n375\t\n376\t        Ok(())\n377\t    }\n378\t\n379\t    /// Run the sync worker loop continuously.\n380\t    pub async fn run(&self) -> Result<()> {\n381\t        info!(\"Starting group sync worker\");\n382\t\n383\t        loop {\n384\t            tokio::select! {\n385\t                _ = tokio::time::sleep(self.config.sync_interval) => {\n386\t                    if let Err(e) = self.sync_iteration().await {\n387\t                        error!(\"Sync iteration failed: {}\", e);\n388\t                    }\n389\t\n390\t                    if let Err(e) = self.check_timeouts().await {\n391\t                        error!(\"Timeout check failed: {}\", e);\n392\t                    }\n393\t                }\n394\t            }\n395\t        }\n396\t    }\n397\t}\n398\t\n399\t#[cfg(test)]\n400\tmod tests {\n401\t    use Implements the group addition flow from plan §2:\n4\t//! 1. Provision new nodes; assign replica_group: G_new in config\n5\t//! 2. Mark new group initializing; queries NOT routed here\n6\t//! 3. Background sync: for each shard, copy all docs from any healthy existing group\n7\t//! 4. When all shards synced, mark group active — queries begin routing in round-robin\n8\t//! 5. Existing groups continue serving queries throughout (zero read interruption)\n9\t\n10\tuse std::collections::HashMap;\n11\tuse std::fmt;\n12\tuse std::time::{Duration, Instant};\n13\t\n14\tuse serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};\n15\t\n16\tuse crate::migration::ShardId;\n17\t\n18\t/// Unique identifier for a group addition operation.\n19\t#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Hash, Serialize, Deserialize)]\n20\tpub struct GroupAdditionId(pub u64);\n21\t\n22\timpl fmt::Display for GroupAdditionId {\n23\t    fn fmt(&self, f: &mut fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> fmt::Result {\n24\t        write!(f, \"{}\", self.0)\n25\t    }\n26\t}\n27\t\n28\t/// Phase of group addition process.\n29\t#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize)]\n30\tpub enum GroupAdditionPhase {\n31\t wait_seconds).\n169\t    pub fn check(\n170\t        &self,\n171\t        ip: &str,\n172\t        limit: u64,\n173\t        window_ms: u64,\n174\t        failed_threshold: u32,\n175\t        backoff_start_minutes: u64,\n176\t        backoff_max_hours: u64,\n177\t    ) -> (bool, Option<u64>) {\n178\t        let mut inner = self.inner.lock().unwrap();\n179\t        let now = now_ms();\n180\t        let state = inner.state.entry(ip.to_string()).or_default();\n181\t\n182\t        // Check if we're in backoff mode\n183\t        if let Some(backoff_until) = state.backoff_until_ms {\n184\t            if backoff_until > now {\n185\t                let wait_seconds = ((backoff_until - now) / 1000) as u64;\n186\t                return (false, // Record this request\n212\t        state.request_timestamps_ms.push(now);\n213\t        (true, None)\n214\t    }\n215\t\n216\t    /// Reset rate limit and backoff state on successful login.\n217\t Self::new()\n244\t    }\n245\t}\n246\t\n247\t/// In-memory rate limiter for search UI (local backend only).\n248\t/// Thread-safe using Arc<Mutex<...>>.\n249\t#[derive(Debug, Clone)]\n250\tpub struct Query Routing and Round-Robin Logic\n\n**File**: `/home/coding/miroir/crates/miroir-core/src/router.rs`\n\n**Round-Robin Group Selection** (lines 95-134):\n```rust\npub fn query_group(query_seq: u64, replica_groups: u32) -> u32 {\n    if replica_groups == 0 { return 0; }\n    (query_seq % replica_groups as u64) as u32\n}\n\npub fn query_group_active(query_seq: u64, topology: &Topology) -> u32 {\n    // Only routes to ACTIVE groups (skips initializing groups)\n    let active_groups: Vec<u32> = topology.groups()\n        .filter(|g| g.is_active())\n        .map(|g| g.id)\n        .collect();\n    \n    if active_groups.is_empty() { return 0; }\n    active_groups[query_seq as usize % active_groups.len()]\n}\n```\n\n**Covering Set Selection** (lines 136-147):\n```rust\npub fn covering_set(shard_count: u32, group: &Group, rf: usize, query_seq: u64) -> Vec<NodeId> {\n    (0..shard_count)\n        .map(|shard_id| {\n            let replicas = assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n            // Rotate through replicas for intra-group load balancing\n            replicas[(query_seq as usize) % replicas.len()].clone()\n        })\n        .collect::<HashSet<_>>()\n        .into_iter()\n        .collect()\n}\n```\n\n## 3. Background sync: for each shard, copy all docs from any healthy existing group\n7\t//! 4. When all shards synced, mark group active — queries begin routing in round-robin\n8\t//! 5. },\n75\t}\n76\t\n77\timpl fmt::Display for ShardSyncState {\n78\t    fn fmt(&self, f: &mut fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> fmt::Result {\n79\t        match self {\n80\t            Self::Pending => write!(f, f,\n87\t                    \"syncing({docs_copied} copied from group {source_group})\"\n88\t                )\n89\t            }\n90\t            Self::Complete {\n91\t                docs_copied,\n92\t                source_group,\n93\t            } => {\n94\t                write!(\n95\t                    f,\n96\t                    \"complete({docs_copied} copied from group {source_group})\"\n97\t                )\n98\t            }\n99\t            Self::Failed {\n100\t                reason,\n101\t                source_group,\n102\t            } => {\n103\t                write!(f, \"failed({reason}, from group {source_group})\")\n104\t            }\n105\t        }\n106\t    }\n107\t}\n108\t\n109\t/// Configuration for group addition behavior.\n110\t#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\n111\tpub struct GroupAdditionConfig {\n112\t    /// Maximum time to wait for sync to complete before failing.\n113\t    pub sync_timeout: Duration,\n114\t    /// Page for GroupAdditionConfig {\n121\t    fn default() -> Self {\n122\t        Self {\n123\t            sync_timeout: Duration::from_secs(3600), // 1 hour\n124\t            sync_page_size: 1000,\n125\t            max_concurrent_syncs: 4,\n126\t        }\n127\t    }\n128\t}\n129\t\n130\t/// Error type for group addition operations.\n131\t#[derive(Debug, thiserror::Error)]\n132\tpub enum GroupAdditionError {\n133\t    #[error(\"group {0} not found\")]\n134\t    GroupNotFound(u32),\n135\t    #[error(\"shard {0} sync is not in a valid state for this transition (current: {1})\")]\n136\t    InvalidTransition(ShardId, String),\n137\t    #[error(\"sync timeout exceeded for group {0}\")]\n138\t    SyncTimeout(u32),\n139\t    #[error(\"no healthy source groups available for sync\")]\n140\t GroupNotInitializing(u32),\n145\t    #[error(\"sync verification failed: new group has {new} docs, source has {source_docs} docs (variance: {variance}%)\")]\n146\t    VerificationFailed {\n147\t        new: u64,\n148\t        source_docs: u64,\n149\t        variance: f64,\n150\t    },\n151\t}\n152\t\n153\t/// Tracks the state of a group addition operation.\n154\t#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\n155\tpub struct GroupAdditionState {\n156\t    pub id: GroupAdditionId,\n157\t    pub group_id: u32,\n158\t    pub phase: GroupAdditionPhase,\n159\t    /// Per-shard sync state.\n160\t    pub shard_states: HashMap<ShardId, ShardSyncState>,\n161\t    /// Source group selected for each shard (round-robin across active groups).\n162\t    pub shard_sources: HashMap<ShardId, u32>,\n163\t    #[serde(skip)]\n164\t    pub started_at: Option<Instant>,\n165\t    #[serde(skip)]\n166\t    pub completed_at: Option<Instant>,\n167\t}\n168\t\n169\t/// The group addition coordinator manages replica group addition state transitions.\n170\tpub struct GroupAdditionCoordinator {\n171\t    config: GroupAdditionConfig,\n172\t    additions: HashMap<GroupAdditionId, GroupAdditionState>,\n173\t    next_id: u64,\n174\t}\n175\t\n176\timpl GroupAdditionCoordinator {\n177\t    pub fn new(config: GroupAdditionConfig) -> Self {\n178\t        Self {\n179\t            config,\n180\t            additions: HashMap::new(),\n181\t            next_id: 0,\n182\t        }\n183\t    }\n184\t\n185\t    /// Begin a new group addition operation.\n186\t    pub fn begin_addition(\n187\t        &mut self,\n188\t        group_id: u32,\n189\t        shard_count: u32,\n190\t        source_groups: &[u32],\n191\t    ) -> Result<GroupAdditionId, GroupAdditionError> {\n192\t        if source_groups.is_empty() {\n193\t            return Err(GroupAdditionError::NoHealthySourceGroups);\n194\t        }\n195\t\n196\t        let id = GroupAdditionId(self.next_id);\n197\t        self.next_id += 1;\n198\t\n199\t        // Assign source group for each shard using round-robin\n200\t        let mut shard_states = HashMap::new();\n201\t        let mut shard_sources = HashMap::new();\n202\t\n203\t        for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n204\t            let source_idx = shard_id as usize % source_groups.len();\n205\t            let source_group = source_groups[source_idx];\n206\t            shard_states.insert(ShardId(shard_id), ShardSyncState::Pending);\n207\t            shard_sources.insert(ShardId(shard_id), source_group);\n208\t        }\n209\t\n210\t        let state = GroupAdditionState {\n211\t            id,\n212\t            group_id,\n213\t            phase: GroupAdditionPhase::Initializing,\n214\t            shard_states,\n215\t            shard_sources,\n216\t            started_at: Some(Instant::now()),\n217\t            completed_at: None,\n218\t        };\n219\t\n220\t        self.additions.insert(id, state);\n221\t        Ok(id)\n222\t    }\n223\t\n224\t    /// Start background sync for a group addition.\n225\t    pub fn begin_sync(\n226\t        &mut self,\n227\t        id: GroupAdditionId,\n228\t    ) -> Result<(), GroupAdditionError> {\n229\t        let state = self\n230\t            .additions\n231\t            .get_mut(&id)\n232\t            .ok_or(GroupAdditionError::NotFound(id))?;\n233\t\n234\t        if !matches!(state.phase, GroupAdditionPhase::Initializing) {\n235\t            return Err(GroupAdditionError::InvalidTransition(\n236\t                ShardId(0),\n237\t                format!(\"expected Initializing, got {}\", state.phase),\n238\t            ));\n239\t        }\n240\t\n241\t        state.phase = GroupAdditionPhase::Syncing;\n242\t\n243\t        // Mark all shards as syncing\n244\t        for (shard_id, &source_group) in &state.shard_sources {\n245\t            if let Some(shard_state) = state.shard_states.get_mut(shard_id) {\n246\t                *shard_state = ShardSyncState::Syncing {\n247\t                    docs_copied: 0,\n248\t                    source_group,\n249\t                };\n250\t            }\n251\t        }\n252\t\n253\t        Ok(())\n254\t    }\n255\t\n256\t    /// Record progress for a shard sync.\n257\t    pub fn shard_sync_progress(\n258\t        &mut self,\n259\t        id: GroupAdditionId,\n260\t        shard: ShardId,\n261\t        docs_copied: u64,\n262\t    ) -> Result<(), GroupAdditionError> {\n263\t        let state = self\n264\t            .additions\n265\t            .get_mut(&id)\n266\t            .ok_or(GroupAdditionError::NotFound(id))?;\n267\t\n268\t        let shard_state = state\n269\t            .shard_states\n270\t            .get_mut(&shard)\n271\t            .ok_or_else(|| GroupAdditionError::InvalidTransition(shard, \"shard not in addition\".into()))?;\n272\t\n273\t        match shard_state {\n274\t            ShardSyncState::Syncing { docs_copied: d, .. } => {\n275\t                *d = docs_copied;\n276\t            }\n277\t            _ => {\n278\t                return Err(GroupAdditionError::InvalidTransition(\n279\t                    shard,\n280\t                    shard_state.to_string(),\n281\t                ));\n282\t            }\n283\t        }\n284\t\n285\t        Ok(())\n286\t    }\n287\t\n288\t    /// Mark a shard sync as complete.\n289\t    pub fn shard_sync_complete(\n290\t        &mut self,\n291\t        id: GroupAdditionId,\n292\t        shard: ShardId,\n293\t        docs_copied: u64,\n294\t    ) -> Result<(), GroupAdditionError> {\n295\t        let state = self\n296\t            .additions\n297\t            .get_mut(&id)\n298\t            .ok_or(GroupAdditionError::NotFound(id))?;\n299\t\n300\t        let source_group = *state\n301\t            .shard_sources\n302\t            .get(&shard)\n303\t            .ok_or_else(|| GroupAdditionError::InvalidTransition(shard, \"no source group\".into()))?;\n304\t\n305\t        let shard_state = state\n306\t            .shard_states\n307\t            .get_mut(&shard)\n308\t            .ok_or_else(|| GroupAdditionError::InvalidTransition(shard, \"shard not in addition\".into()))?;\n309\t\n310\t        match shard_state {\n311\t            ShardSyncState::Syncing { .. } => {\n312\t                *shard_state = ShardSyncState::Complete {\n313\t                    docs_copied,\n314\t                    source_group,\n315\t                };\n316\t            }\n317\t            _ => {\n318\t                return Err(GroupAdditionError::InvalidTransition(\n319\t                    shard,\n320\t                    shard_state.to_string(),\n321\t                ));\n322\t            }\n323\t        }\n324\t\n325\t        // Check if all shards are done syncing\n326\t        let all_complete = state\n327\t            .shard_states\n328\t            .values()\n329\t            .all(|s| matches!(s, ShardSyncState::Complete { .. }));\n330\t\n331\t        if all_complete {\n332\t            state.phase = GroupAdditionPhase::SyncComplete;\n333\t        }\n334\t\n335\t        Ok(())\n336\t    }\n337\t\n338\t    /// Mark a shard sync as failed.\n339\t    pub fn shard_sync_failed(\n340\t        &mut self,\n341\t        id: GroupAdditionId,\n342\t        shard: ShardId,\n343\t        reason: String,\n344\t    ) -> Result<(), GroupAdditionError> {\n345\t        let state = self\n346\t            .additions\n347\t            .get_mut(&id)\n348\t            .ok_or(GroupAdditionError::NotFound(id))?;\n349\t\n350\t        let source_group = *state\n351\t            .shard_sources\n352\t            .get(&shard)\n353\t            .ok_or_else(|| GroupAdditionError::InvalidTransition(shard, \"no source group\".into()))?;\n354\t\n355\t        let shard_state = state\n356\t            .shard_states\n357\t            .get_mut(&shard)\n358\t            .ok_or_else(|| GroupAdditionError::InvalidTransition(shard, \"shard not in addition\".into()))?;\n359\t\n360\t        *shard_state = ShardSyncState::Failed {\n361\t            reason,\n362\t            source_group,\n363\t        };\n364\t\n365\t        Ok(())\n366\t    }\n367\t\n368\t    /// Mark the group as active after sync is complete and verified.\n369\t    pub fn mark_group_active(\n370\t        &mut self,\n371\t        id: GroupAdditionId,\n372\t    ) -> Result<(), GroupAdditionError> {\n373\t        let state = self\n374\t            .additions\n375\t            .get_mut(&id)\n376\t            .ok_or(GroupAdditionError::NotFound(id))?;\n377\t\n378\t        if !matches!(state.phase, GroupAdditionPhase::SyncComplete) {\n379\t            return Err(GroupAdditionError::InvalidTransition(\n380\t                ShardId(0),\n381\t                format!(\"expected SyncComplete, got {}\", state.phase),\n382\t            ));\n383\t        }\n384\t\n385\t        state.phase = GroupAdditionPhase::Active;\n386\t        state.completed_at = Some(Instant::now());\n387\t\n388\t        Ok(())\n389\t    }\n390\t\n391\t    /// Fail a group addition operation.\n392\t    pub fn fail_addition(\n393\t        &mut self,\n394\t        id: GroupAdditionId,\n395\t        reason: String,\n396\t    ) -> Result<(), GroupAdditionError> {\n397\t        let state = self\n398\t            .additions\n399\t            .get_mut(&id)\n400\t            .ok_or(GroupAdditionError::NotFound(id))?;\n401\t\n402\t        state.phase = GroupAdditionPhase::Failed(reason);\n403\t        state.completed_at = Some(Instant::now());\n404\t\n405\t        Ok(())\n406\t    }\n407\t\n408\t    /// Get the current state of a group addition.\n409\t    pub fn get_state(&self, id: GroupAdditionId) -> Option<&GroupAdditionState> {\n410\t        self.additions.get(&id)\n411\t    }\n412\t\n413\t    /// Get the current state of a group addition (mutable).\n414\t    pub fn get_state_mut(&mut self, id: GroupAdditionId) -> Option<&mut GroupAdditionState> {\n415\t        self.additions.get_mut(&id)\n416\t    }\n417\t\n418\t    /// Get all group addition states.\n419\t    pub fn get_all_additions(&self) -> &HashMap<GroupAdditionId, GroupAdditionState> {\n420\t        &self.additions\n421\t    }\n422\t\n423\t    /// Get the group addition config.\n424\t    pub fn config(&self) -> &GroupAdditionConfig {\n425\t        &self.config\n426\t    }\n427\t\n428\t    /// Check if a group is currently being added (in progress).\n429\t    pub fn is_group_adding(&self, group_id: u32) -> bool {\n430\t        self.additions.values().any(|a| {\n431\t            a.group_id == group_id\n432\t                && matches!(\n433\t                    a.phase,\n434\t                    GroupAdditionPhase::Initializing | GroupAdditionPhase::Syncing\n435\t                )\n436\t        })\n437\t    }\n438\t\n439\t    /// Calculate sync progress percentage for a group addition.\n440\t    pub fn sync_progress(&self, id: GroupAdditionId) -> Option<f64> {\n441\t        let state = self.additions.get(&id)?;\n442\t        if state.shard_states.is_empty() {\n443\t            return Some(0.0);\n444\t        }\n445\t\n446\t        let total_shards = state.shard_states.len();\n447\t        let complete_shards = state\n448\t            .shard_states\n449\t            .values()\n450\t            .filter(|s| matches!(s, ShardSyncState::Complete { .. }))\n451\t            .count();\n452\t\n453\t        Some((complete_shards as f64 / total_shards as f64) * 100.0)\n454\t    }\n455\t\n456\t    /// Get the source group for a shard.\n457\t    pub fn get_shard_source(&self, id: GroupAdditionId, shard: ShardId) -> Option<u32> {\n458\t        let state = self.additions.get(&id)?;\n459\t        state.shard_sources.get(&shard).copied()\n460\t    }\n461\t}\n462\t\n463\t#[cfg(test)]\n464\tmod tests {\n465\t    use Replica group addition state machine.\n//!\n//! Implements the group addition flow from plan §2:\n//! 1. Provision new nodes; assign replica_group: G_new in config\n//! 2. Mark new group initializing; queries NOT routed here\n//! 3. Background sync: for each shard, copy all docs from any healthy existing group\n//! 4. When all shards synced, mark group active — queries begin routing in round-robin\n//! 5. Existing groups continue serving queries throughout (zero read interruption)\n\nuse std::collections::HashMap;\nuse std::fmt;\nuse std::time::{Duration, Instant};\n\nuse serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};\n\nuse crate::migration::ShardId;\n\n/// Unique identifier for a group addition operation.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Hash, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct GroupAdditionId(pub u64);\n\nimpl fmt::Display for GroupAdditionId {\n    fn fmt(&self, f: &mut fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> fmt::Result {\n        write!(f, \"{}\", self.0)\n    }\n}\n\n/// Phase of group addition process.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub enum GroupAdditionPhase {\n    /// Initial phase: group provisioned, waiting for sync to start.\n    Initializing,\n    /// Background sync in progress: copying docs from existing groups.\n    Syncing,\n    /// All shards synced, ready to mark group active.\n    SyncComplete,\n    /// Group is active and serving queries.\n    Active,\n    /// Group addition failed.\n    Failed(String),\n}\n\nimpl fmt::Display for GroupAdditionPhase {\n    fn fmt(&self, f: &mut fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> fmt::Result {\n        match self {\n            Self::Initializing => write!(f, \"initializing\"),\n            Self::Syncing => write!(f, \"syncing\"),\n            Self::SyncComplete => write!(f, \"sync_complete\"),\n            Self::Active => write!(f, \"active\"),\n            Self::Failed(msg) => write!(f, \"failed({msg})\"),\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n/// Per-shard sync state within a group addition.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub enum ShardSyncState {\n    /// Waiting for sync to begin.\n    Pending,\n    /// Syncing documents from source group.\n    Syncing {\n        docs_copied: u64,\n        source_group: u32,\n    },\n    /// Sync complete for this shard.\n    Complete {\n        docs_copied: u64,\n        source_group: u32,\n    },\n    /// Sync failed for this shard.\n    Failed {\n        reason: String,\n        source_group: u32,\n    },\n}\n\nimpl fmt::Display for ShardSyncState {\n    fn fmt(&self, f: &mut fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> fmt::Result {\n        match self {\n            Self::Pending => write!(f, \"pending\"),\n            Self::Syncing {\n                docs_copied,\n                source_group,\n            } => {\n                write!(\n                    f,\n                    \"syncing({docs_copied} copied from group {source_group})\"\n                )\n            }\n            Self::Complete {\n                docs_copied,\n                source_group,\n            } => {\n                write!(\n                    f,\n                    \"complete({docs_copied} copied from group {source_group})\"\n                )\n            }\n            Self::Failed {\n                reason,\n                source_group,\n            } => {\n                write!(f, \"failed({reason}, from group {source_group})\")\n            }\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n/// Configuration for group addition behavior.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct GroupAdditionConfig {\n    /// Maximum time to wait for sync to complete before failing.\n    pub sync_timeout: Duration,\n    /// Page size for document pagination during sync.\n    pub sync_page_size: u32,\n    /// Maximum concurrent shard syncs.\n    pub max_concurrent_syncs: usize,\n}\n\nimpl Default for GroupAdditionConfig {\n    fn default() -> Self {\n        Self {\n            sync_timeout: Duration::from_secs(3600), // 1 hour\n            sync_page_size: 1000,\n            max_concurrent_syncs: 4,\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n/// Error type for group addition operations.\n#[derive(Debug, thiserror::Error)]\npub enum GroupAdditionError {\n    #[error(\"group {0} not found\")]\n    GroupNotFound(u32),\n    #[error(\"shard {0} sync is not in a valid state for this transition (current: {1})\")]\n    InvalidTransition(ShardId, String),\n    #[error(\"sync timeout exceeded for group {0}\")]\n    SyncTimeout(u32),\n    #[error(\"no healthy source groups available for sync\")]\n    NoHealthySourceGroups,\n    #[error(\"group addition {0} not found\")]\n    NotFound(GroupAdditionId),\n    #[error(\"group {0} is not in initializing state\")]\n    GroupNotInitializing(u32),\n    #[error(\"sync verification failed: new group has {new} docs, source has {source_docs} docs (variance: {variance}%)\")]\n    VerificationFailed {\n        new: u64,\n        source_docs: u64,\n        variance: f64,\n    },\n}\n\n/// Tracks the state of a group addition operation.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct GroupAdditionState {\n    pub id: GroupAdditionId,\n    pub group_id: u32,\n    pub phase: GroupAdditionPhase,\n    /// Per-shard sync state.\n    pub shard_states: HashMap<ShardId, ShardSyncState>,\n    /// Source group selected for each shard (round-robin across active groups).\n    pub shard_sources: HashMap<ShardId, u32>,\n    #[serde(skip)]\n    pub started_at: Option<Instant>,\n    #[serde(skip)]\n    pub completed_at: Option<Instant>,\n}\n\n/// The group addition coordinator manages replica group addition state transitions.\npub struct GroupAdditionCoordinator {\n    config: GroupAdditionConfig,\n    additions: HashMap<GroupAdditionId, GroupAdditionState>,\n    next_id: u64,\n}\n\nimpl GroupAdditionCoordinator {\n    pub fn new(config: GroupAdditionConfig) -> Self {\n        Self {\n            config,\n            additions: HashMap::new(),\n            next_id: 0,\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// Begin a new group addition operation.\n    pub fn begin_addition(\n        &mut self,\n        group_id: u32,\n        shard_count: u32,\n        source_groups: &[u32],\n    ) -> Result<GroupAdditionId, GroupAdditionError> {\n        if source_groups.is_empty() {\n            return Err(GroupAdditionError::NoHealthySourceGroups);\n        }\n\n        let id = GroupAdditionId(self.next_id);\n        self.next_id += 1;\n\n        // Assign source group for each shard using round-robin\n        let mut shard_states = HashMap::new();\n        let mut shard_sources = HashMap::new();\n\n        for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n            let source_idx = shard_id as usize % source_groups.len();\n            let source_group = source_groups[source_idx];\n            shard_states.insert(ShardId(shard_id), ShardSyncState::Pending);\n            shard_sources.insert(ShardId(shard_id), source_group);\n        }\n\n        let state = GroupAdditionState {\n            id,\n            group_id,\n            phase: GroupAdditionPhase::Initializing,\n            shard_states,\n            shard_sources,\n            started_at: Some(Instant::now()),\n            completed_at: None,\n        };\n\n        self.additions.insert(id, state);\n        Ok(id)\n    }\n\n    /// Start background sync for a group addition.\n    pub fn begin_sync(\n        &mut self,\n        id: GroupAdditionId,\n    ) -> Result<(), GroupAdditionError> {\n        let state = self\n            .additions\n            .get_mut(&id)\n            .ok_or(GroupAdditionError::NotFound(id))?;\n\n        if !matches!(state.phase, GroupAdditionPhase::Initializing) {\n            return Err(GroupAdditionError::InvalidTransition(\n                ShardId(0),\n                format!(\"expected Initializing, got {}\", state.phase),\n            ));\n        }\n\n        state.phase = GroupAdditionPhase::Syncing;\n\n        // Mark all shards as syncing\n        for (shard_id, &source_group) in &state.shard_sources {\n            if let Some(shard_state) = state.shard_states.get_mut(shard_id) {\n                *shard_state = ShardSyncState::Syncing {\n                    docs_copied: 0,\n                    source_group,\n                };\n            }\n        }\n\n        Ok(())\n    }\n\n    /// Record progress for a shard sync.\n    pub fn shard_sync_progress(\n        &mut self,\n        id: GroupAdditionId,\n        shard: ShardId,\n        docs_copied: u64,\n    ) -> Result<(), GroupAdditionError> {\n        let state = self\n            .additions\n            .get_mut(&id)\n            .ok_or(GroupAdditionError::NotFound(id))?;\n\n        let shard_state = state\n            .shard_states\n            .get_mut(&shard)\n            .ok_or_else(|| GroupAdditionError::InvalidTransition(shard, \"shard not in addition\".into()))?;\n\n        match shard_state {\n            ShardSyncState::Syncing { docs_copied: d, .. } => {\n                *d = docs_copied;\n            }\n            _ => {\n                return Err(GroupAdditionError::InvalidTransition(\n                    shard,\n                    shard_state.to_string(),\n                ));\n            }\n        }\n\n        Ok(())\n    }\n\n    /// Mark a shard sync as complete.\n    pub fn shard_sync_complete(\n        &mut self,\n        id: GroupAdditionId,\n        shard: ShardId,\n        docs_copied: u64,\n    ) -> Result<(), GroupAdditionError> {\n        let state = self\n            .additions\n            .get_mut(&id)\n            .ok_or(GroupAdditionError::NotFound(id))?;\n\n        let source_group = *state\n            .shard_sources\n            .get(&shard)\n            .ok_or_else(|| GroupAdditionError::InvalidTransition(shard, \"no source group\".into()))?;\n\n        let shard_state = state\n            .shard_states\n            .get_mut(&shard)\n            .ok_or_else(|| GroupAdditionError::InvalidTransition(shard, \"shard not in addition\".into()))?;\n\n        match shard_state {\n            ShardSyncState::Syncing { .. } => {\n                *shard_state = ShardSyncState::Complete {\n                    docs_copied,\n                    source_group,\n                };\n            }\n            _ => {\n                return Err(GroupAdditionError::InvalidTransition(\n                    shard,\n                    shard_state.to_string(),\n                ));\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Check if all shards are done syncing\n        let all_complete = state\n            .shard_states\n            .values()\n            .all(|s| matches!(s, ShardSyncState::Complete { .. }));\n\n        if all_complete {\n            state.phase = GroupAdditionPhase::SyncComplete;\n        }\n\n        Ok(())\n    }\n\n    /// Mark a shard sync as failed.\n    pub fn shard_sync_failed(\n        &mut self,\n        id: GroupAdditionId,\n        shard: ShardId,\n        reason: String,\n    ) -> Result<(), GroupAdditionError> {\n        let state = self\n            .additions\n            .get_mut(&id)\n            .ok_or(GroupAdditionError::NotFound(id))?;\n\n        let source_group = *state\n            .shard_sources\n            .get(&shard)\n            .ok_or_else(|| GroupAdditionError::InvalidTransition(shard, \"no source group\".into()))?;\n\n        let shard_state = state\n            .shard_states\n            .get_mut(&shard)\n            .ok_or_else(|| GroupAdditionError::InvalidTransition(shard, \"shard not in addition\".into()))?;\n\n        *shard_state = ShardSyncState::Failed {\n            reason,\n            source_group,\n        };\n\n        Ok(())\n    }\n\n    /// Mark the group as active after sync is complete and verified.\n    pub fn mark_group_active(\n        &mut self,\n        id: GroupAdditionId,\n    ) -> Result<(), GroupAdditionError> {\n        let state = self\n            .additions\n            .get_mut(&id)\n            .ok_or(GroupAdditionError::NotFound(id))?;\n\n        if !matches!(state.phase, GroupAdditionPhase::SyncComplete) {\n            return Err(GroupAdditionError::InvalidTransition(\n                ShardId(0),\n                format!(\"expected SyncComplete, got {}\", state.phase),\n            ));\n        }\n\n        state.phase = GroupAdditionPhase::Active;\n        state.completed_at = Some(Instant::now());\n\n        Ok(())\n    }\n\n    /// Fail a group addition operation.\n    pub fn fail_addition(\n        &mut self,\n        id: GroupAdditionId,\n        reason: String,\n    ) -> Result<(), GroupAdditionError> {\n        let state = self\n            .additions\n            .get_mut(&id)\n            .ok_or(GroupAdditionError::NotFound(id))?;\n\n        state.phase = GroupAdditionPhase::Failed(reason);\n        state.completed_at = Some(Instant::now());\n\n        Ok(())\n    }\n\n    /// Get the current state of a group addition.\n    pub fn get_state(&self, id: GroupAdditionId) -> Option<&GroupAdditionState> {\n        self.additions.get(&id)\n    }\n\n    /// Get the current state of a group addition (mutable).\n    pub fn get_state_mut(&mut self, id: GroupAdditionId) -> Option<&mut GroupAdditionState> {\n        self.additions.get_mut(&id)\n    }\n\n    /// Get all group addition states.\n    pub fn get_all_additions(&self) -> &HashMap<GroupAdditionId, GroupAdditionState> {\n        &self.additions\n    }\n\n    /// Get the group addition config.\n    pub fn config(&self) -> &GroupAdditionConfig {\n        &self.config\n    }\n\n    /// Check if a group is currently being added (in progress).\n    pub fn is_group_adding(&self, group_id: u32) -> bool {\n        self.additions.values().any(|a| {\n            a.group_id == group_id\n                && matches!(\n                    a.phase,\n                    GroupAdditionPhase::Initializing | GroupAdditionPhase::Syncing\n                )\n        })\n    }\n\n    /// Calculate sync progress percentage for a group addition.\n    pub fn sync_progress(&self, id: GroupAdditionId) -> Option<f64> {\n        let state = self.additions.get(&id)?;\n        if state.shard_states.is_empty() {\n            return Some(0.0);\n        }\n\n        let total_shards = state.shard_states.len();\n        let complete_shards = state\n            .shard_states\n            .values()\n            .filter(|s| matches!(s, ShardSyncState::Complete { .. }))\n            .count();\n\n        Some((complete_shards as f64 / total_shards as f64) * 100.0)\n    }\n\n    /// Get the source group for a shard.\n    pub fn get_shard_source(&self, id: GroupAdditionId, shard: ShardId) -> Option<u32> {\n        let state = self.additions.get(&id)?;\n        state.shard_sources.get(&shard).copied()\n    }\n}\n\n#[cfg(test)]\nmod tests {\n    use super::*;\n\n    fn shard(id: u32) -> ShardId {\n        ShardId(id)\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_begin_addition() {\n        let config = GroupAdditionConfig::default();\n        let mut coord = GroupAdditionCoordinator::new(config);\n\n        let source_groups = vec![0, 1];\n        let id = coord.begin_addition(2, 64, &source_groups).unwrap();\n\n        let state = coord.get_state(id).unwrap();\n        assert_eq!(state.group_id, 2);\n        assert_eq!(state.phase, GroupAdditionPhase::Initializing);\n        assert_eq!(state.shard_states.len(), 64);\n\n        // Check source groups are round-robin assigned\n        assert_eq!(coord.get_shard_source(id, shard(0)), Some(0));\n        assert_eq!(coord.get_shard_source(id, shard(1)), Some(1));\n        assert_eq!(coord.get_shard_source(id, shard(2)), Some(0));\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_begin_addition_no_source_groups() {\n        let config = GroupAdditionConfig::default();\n        let mut coord = GroupAdditionCoordinator::new(config);\n\n        let result = coord.begin_addition(1, 64, &[]);\n        assert!(matches!(result, Err(GroupAdditionError::NoHealthySourceGroups)));\n    }\n\n        .unwrap();\n        }\n\n        assert_eq!(coord.sync_progress(id), Some(50.0));\n\n        // Complete remaining shards\n        for s in 5..10 {\n            coord\n                .shard_sync_complete(id, shard(s), 100)\n                .unwrap();\n        }\n\n        assert_eq!(coord.sync_progress(id), Some(100.0));\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_display_impls() {\n #[instrument(skip_all, fields(additions_count))]\n104\t    pub async fn sync_iteration(&self) -> Result<usize> {\n105\t        let coordinator = self.coordinator.read().await;\n106\t        let additions = coordinator.get_all_additions().clone();\n107\t        drop(coordinator);\n108\t\n109\t        let mut jobs_completed = 0;\n110\t\n111\t        for (addition_id, state) in additions {\n112\t            // Only sync additions in Syncing phase\n113\t            if !matches!(state.phase, crate::group_addition::GroupAdditionPhase::Syncing) {\n114\t                continue;\n115\t            }\n116\t\n117\t            // Find pending shards to sync\n118\t            let pending_shards: Vec<_> = state\n119\t                .shard_states\n120\t                .iter()\n121\t                .filter(|(_, s)| matches!(s, crate::group_addition::ShardSyncState::Syncing { .. }))\n122\t                .map(|(shard, s)| (*shard, s.clone()))\n123\t                .collect();\n124\t\n125\t            if pending_shards.is_empty() {\n126\t                continue;\n127\t            }\n128\t\n129\t            // Sync each pending shard\n130\t            for (shard_id, shard_state) in pending_shards {\n131\t                let source_group = match shard_state {\n132\t                    crate::group_addition::ShardSyncState::Syncing { source_group, .. } => {\n133\t                        source_group\n134\t                    }\n135\t                    _ => continue,\n136\t                };\n137\t\n138\t                match self.sync_shard(addition_id, shard_id, source_group).await {\n139\t                    Ok(docs_copied) => {\n140\t                        jobs_completed += 1;\n141\t                        let mut coord = self.coordinator.write().await;\n142\t                        if docs_copied > 0 {\n143\t                            // Update progress\n144\t                            let _ = coord.shard_sync_progress(addition_id, shard_id, docs_copied);\n145\t                        }\n146\t                    }\n147\t                    Err(e) => {\n148\t                        warn!(\n149\t                            addition_id = %addition_id,\n150\t                            shard_id = shard_id.0,\n151\t                            error = %e,\n152\t                            \"Shard sync failed, will retry\"\n153\t                        );\n154\t                    }\n155\t                }\n156\t            }\n157\t        }\n158\t\n159\t        Ok(jobs_completed)\n160\t    }\n161\t\n162\t    /// Sync a single shard from source group to new group.\n163\t    #[instrument(skip_all, fields(addition_id, shard_id, source_group))]\n164\t    async fn sync_shard(\n165\t        &self,\n166\t        addition_id: GroupAdditionId,\n167\t        shard_id: ShardId,\n168\t        source_group: u32,\n169\t    ) -> Result<u64> {\n170\t        let topology = self.topology.read().await;\n171\t        let page_size = self\n172\t            .coordinator\n173\t            .read()\n174\t            .await\n175\t            .config()\n176\t            .sync_page_size;\n177\t\n178\t        // Get source group\n179\t        let source = topology\n180\t            .group(source_group)\n181\t            .ok_or_else(|| {\n182\t                crate::error::MiroirError::Topology(format!(\n183\t                    \"source group {} not found\",\n184\t                    source_group\n185\t                ))\n186\t            })?;\n187\t\n188\t        // Get target group (the new group being added)\n189\t        let target_group_id = {\n190\t            let coord = self.coordinator.read().await;\n191\t            let state = coord.get_state(addition_id).ok_or_else(|| {\n192\t                crate::error::MiroirError::Topology(format!(\n193\t                    \"addition {} not found\",\n194\t                    addition_id\n195\t                ))\n196\t            })?;\n197\t            state.group_id\n198\t        };\n199\t\n200\t        let target = topology\n201\t            .group(target_group_id)\n202\t            .ok_or_else(|| {\n203\t                crate::error::MiroirError::Topology(format!(\n204\t                    \"target group {} not found\",\n205\t                    target_group_id\n206\t                ))\n207\t            })?;\n208\t\n209\t        // Find healthy nodes in source and target groups\n210\t        let node_map = topology.node_map();\n211\t .first()\n216\t            .ok_or_else(|| {\n217\t                crate::error::MiroirError::Topology(format!(\n218\t                    \"no healthy nodes in source group {}\",\n219\t                    source_group\n220\t                ))\n221\t            })?;\n222\t\n223\t        let target_node = target_healthy\n224\t            .first()\n225\t            .ok_or_else(|| {\n226\t let mut offset = 0u32;\n241\t        let mut total_copied = 0u64;\n242\t        let mut has_more = true;\n243\t\n244\t        while has_more {\n245\t            let filter_value = serde_json::json!(shard_id.0);\n246\t\n247\t            let fetch_req = FetchDocumentsRequest {\n248\t                index_uid: \"_miroir_all_docs\".to_string(),\n249\t                filter: serde_json::json!({\"_miroir_shard\": filter_value}),\n250\t                limit: page_size,\n251\t                offset,\n252\t            };\n253\t\n254\t            // Fetch from source\n255\t            let docs = tokio::time::timeout(\n256\t                self.config.fetch_timeout,\n257\t                self.node_client.fetch_documents(&source_node_id, &source_node_address, &fetch_req),\n258\t            )\n259\t            .await\n260\t            .map_err(|_| {\n261\t                crate::error::MiroirError::Routing(format!(\n262\t                    \"fetch timeout crate::error::MiroirError::Routing(format!(\n268\t                    \"fetch failed for shard {}: {}\",\n269\t                    shard_id, e\n270\t                ))\n271\t .ok_or_else(|| {\n278\t                    crate::error::MiroirError::Routing(\n279\t                        \"invalid response: missing results array\".to_string(),\n280\t                    )\n281\t                })?;\n282\t\n283\t            let total = docs.get(\"total\").and_then(|v| v.as_u64()).unwrap_or(0);\n284\t\n285\t            if results.is_empty() {\n286\t                has_more = false;\n287\t                break;\n288\t            }\n289\t\n290\t            // Write to target\n291\t            self.node_client\n292\t                .write_documents(\n293\t                    &target_node_id,\n294\t                    &target_node_address,\n295\t                    &fetch_req.index_uid,\n296\t                    results.clone(),\n297\t                )\n298\t          shard_id, e\n303\t                    ))\n304\t                })?;\n305\t\n306\t            let count = results.len() as u64;\n307\t            total_copied += count;\n308\t\n309\t total_copied,\n315\t                total,\n316\t                \"Synced page\"\n317\t            );\n318\t\n319\t            // Check if we're done\n320\t            has_more = (offset as u64 + count) < total;\n321\t            offset += page_size;\n322\t        }\n323\t\n324\t        // Mark shard as complete\n325\t        let mut coord = self.coordinator.write().await;\n326\t        coord\n327\t            .shard_sync_complete(addition_id, shard_id, total_copied)\n328\t            .map_err(|e| {\n329\t                crate::error::MiroirError::Topology(format!(\n330\t }\n344\t\n345\t    /// Check for sync timeout and fail additions that have exceeded the limit.\n346\t    #[instrument(skip_all)]\n347\t    pub async fn check_timeouts(&self) -> Result<()> {\n348\t        let coord = self.coordinator.write().await;\n349\t        let additions = coord.get_all_additions().clone();\n350\t        drop(coord);\n351\t\n352\t        let timeout = Duration::from_secs(3600); // 1 hour default\n353\t\n354\t        for (addition_id, state) in additions {\n355\t            if !matches!(state.phase, crate::group_addition::GroupAdditionPhase::Syncing) {\n356\t                continue;\n357\t            }\n358\t\n359\t            if let Some(started_at) = state.started_at {\n360\t                if started_at.elapsed() > timeout {\n361\t                    warn!(\n362\t );\n366\t\n367\t                    let mut coord = self.coordinator.write().await;\n368\t                    let _ = coord.fail_addition(\n369\t                        addition_id,\n370\t                        format!(\"sync timeout after {:?}\", timeout),\n371\t                    );\n372\t                }\n373\t            }\n374\t        }\n375\t\n376\t        Ok(())\n377\t    }\n378\t\n379\t    /// Run the sync worker loop continuously.\n380\t    pub async fn run(&self) -> Result<()> {\n381\t        info!(\"Starting group sync worker\");\n382\t\n383\t        loop {\n384\t Background worker for syncing documents to a new replica group.\n//!\n//! Implements the document sync phase of group addition (plan §2 step 3):\n//! - For each shard, copy all docs from any healthy existing group\n//! - Uses pagination with filter=_miroir_shard={id}\n//! - Tracks progress via GroupAdditionCoordinator\n//! - Pauses/resumes per Phase 6 Mode C\n\nuse std::collections::HashMap;\nuse std::sync::Arc;\nuse std::time::Duration;\n\nuse tokio::sync::RwLock;\nuse tracing::{debug, error, info, instrument, warn};\n\nuse crate::group_addition::{\n    GroupAdditionCoordinator, GroupAdditionError, GroupAdditionId,\n};\nuse crate::migration::ShardId;\nuse crate::scatter::FetchDocumentsRequest;\nuse crate::topology::{Group, GroupState, Node, NodeId, Topology};\nuse crate::Result;\n\n/// Configuration for the group sync worker.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone)]\npub struct GroupSyncWorkerConfig {\n    /// Interval between sync iterations.\n    pub sync_interval: Duration,\n    /// Timeout for individual fetch operations.\n    pub fetch_timeout: Duration,\n    /// Maximum retries for failed fetches.\n    pub max_retries: usize,\n}\n\nimpl Default for GroupSyncWorkerConfig {\n    fn default() -> Self {\n        Self {\n            sync_interval: Duration::from_millis(100),\n            fetch_timeout: Duration::from_secs(30),\n            max_retries: 3,\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n/// A job representing a single shard sync operation.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone)]\npub struct ShardSyncJob {\n    pub addition_id: GroupAdditionId,\n    pub shard_id: ShardId,\n    pub source_group: u32,\n    pub offset: u32,\n    pub limit: u32,\n    pub total_estimated: u64,\n    pub docs_copied: u64,\n    pub retries: usize,\n}\n\n/// NodeClient trait for fetching documents during sync.\n#[allow(async_fn_in_trait)]\npub trait SyncNodeClient: Send + Sync {\n    /// Fetch documents from a node with pagination.\n    async fn fetch_documents(\n        &self,\n        node: &NodeId,\n        address: &str,\n        request: &FetchDocumentsRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<serde_json::Value, String>;\n\n    /// Write documents to a node.\n    async fn write_documents(\n        &self,\n        node: &NodeId,\n        address: &str,\n        index_uid: &str,\n        documents: Vec<serde_json::Value>,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<(), String>;\n}\n\n/// The group sync worker handles background document sync for group addition.\npub struct GroupSyncWorker<C: SyncNodeClient> {\n    config: GroupSyncWorkerConfig,\n    coordinator: Arc<RwLock<GroupAdditionCoordinator>>,\n    node_client: Arc<C>,\n    topology: Arc<RwLock<Topology>>,\n}\n\nimpl<C: SyncNodeClient> GroupSyncWorker<C> {\n    pub fn new(\n        config: GroupSyncWorkerConfig,\n        coordinator: Arc<RwLock<GroupAdditionCoordinator>>,\n        node_client: Arc<C>,\n        topology: Arc<RwLock<Topology>>,\n    ) -> Self {\n        Self {\n            config,\n            coordinator,\n            node_client,\n            topology,\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// Run a single sync iteration for all active group additions.\n    #[instrument(skip_all, fields(additions_count))]\n    pub async fn sync_iteration(&self) -> Result<usize> {\n        let coordinator = self.coordinator.read().await;\n        let additions = coordinator.get_all_additions().clone();\n        drop(coordinator);\n\n        let mut jobs_completed = 0;\n\n        for (addition_id, state) in additions {\n            // Only sync additions in Syncing phase\n            if !matches!(state.phase, crate::group_addition::GroupAdditionPhase::Syncing) {\n                continue;\n            }\n\n            // Find pending shards to sync\n            let pending_shards: Vec<_> = state\n                .shard_states\n                .iter()\n                .filter(|(_, s)| matches!(s, crate::group_addition::ShardSyncState::Syncing { .. }))\n                .map(|(shard, s)| (*shard, s.clone()))\n                .collect();\n\n            if pending_shards.is_empty() {\n                continue;\n            }\n\n            // Sync each pending shard\n            for (shard_id, shard_state) in pending_shards {\n                let source_group = match shard_state {\n                    crate::group_addition::ShardSyncState::Syncing { source_group, .. } => {\n                        source_group\n                    }\n                    _ => continue,\n                };\n\n                match self.sync_shard(addition_id, shard_id, source_group).await {\n                    Ok(docs_copied) => {\n                        jobs_completed += 1;\n                        let mut coord = self.coordinator.write().await;\n                        if docs_copied > 0 {\n                            // Update progress\n                            let _ = coord.shard_sync_progress(addition_id, shard_id, docs_copied);\n                        }\n                    }\n                    Err(e) => {\n                        warn!(\n                            addition_id = %addition_id,\n                            shard_id = shard_id.0,\n                            error = %e,\n                            \"Shard sync failed, will retry\"\n                        );\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        Ok(jobs_completed)\n    }\n\n    /// Sync a single shard from source group to new group.\n    #[instrument(skip_all, fields(addition_id, shard_id, source_group))]\n    async fn sync_shard(\n        &self,\n        addition_id: GroupAdditionId,\n        shard_id: ShardId,\n        source_group: u32,\n    ) -> Result<u64> {\n        let topology = self.topology.read().await;\n        let page_size = self\n            .coordinator\n            .read()\n            .await\n            .config()\n            .sync_page_size;\n\n        // Get source group\n        let source = topology\n            .group(source_group)\n            .ok_or_else(|| {\n                crate::error::MiroirError::Topology(format!(\n                    \"source group {} not found\",\n                    source_group\n                ))\n            })?;\n\n        // Get target group (the new group being added)\n        let target_group_id = {\n            let coord = self.coordinator.read().await;\n            let state = coord.get_state(addition_id).ok_or_else(|| {\n                crate::error::MiroirError::Topology(format!(\n                    \"addition {} not found\",\n                    addition_id\n                ))\n            })?;\n            state.group_id\n        };\n\n        let target = topology\n            .group(target_group_id)\n            .ok_or_else(|| {\n                crate::error::MiroirError::Topology(format!(\n                    \"target group {} not found\",\n                    target_group_id\n                ))\n            })?;\n\n        // Find healthy nodes in source and target groups\n        let node_map = topology.node_map();\n        let source_healthy = source.healthy_nodes(&node_map);\n        let target_healthy = target.healthy_nodes(&node_map);\n\n        let source_node = source_healthy\n            .first()\n            .ok_or_else(|| {\n                crate::error::MiroirError::Topology(format!(\n                    \"no healthy nodes in source group {}\",\n                    source_group\n                ))\n            })?;\n\n        let target_node = target_healthy\n            .first()\n            .ok_or_else(|| {\n                crate::error::MiroirError::Topology(format!(\n                    \"no healthy nodes in target group {}\",\n                    target_group_id\n                ))\n            })?;\n\n        let source_node_id = source_node.id.clone();\n        let source_node_address = source_node.address.clone();\n        let target_node_id = target_node.id.clone();\n        let target_node_address = target_node.address.clone();\n\n        drop(topology);\n\n        // Sync documents with pagination\n        let mut offset = 0u32;\n        let mut total_copied = 0u64;\n        let mut has_more = true;\n\n        while has_more {\n            let filter_value = serde_json::json!(shard_id.0);\n\n            let fetch_req = FetchDocumentsRequest {\n                index_uid: \"_miroir_all_docs\".to_string(),\n                filter: serde_json::json!({\"_miroir_shard\": filter_value}),\n                limit: page_size,\n                offset,\n            };\n\n            // Fetch from source\n            let docs = tokio::time::timeout(\n                self.config.fetch_timeout,\n                self.node_client.fetch_documents(&source_node_id, &source_node_address, &fetch_req),\n            )\n            .await\n            .map_err(|_| {\n                crate::error::MiroirError::Routing(format!(\n                    \"fetch timeout for shard {} from group {}\",\n                    shard_id, source_group\n                ))\n            })?\n            .map_err(|e| {\n                crate::error::MiroirError::Routing(format!(\n                    \"fetch failed for shard {}: {}\",\n                    shard_id, e\n                ))\n            })?;\n\n            // Parse response\n            let results = docs\n                .get(\"results\")\n                .and_then(|v| v.as_array())\n                .ok_or_else(|| {\n                    crate::error::MiroirError::Routing(\n                        \"invalid response: missing results array\".to_string(),\n                    )\n                })?;\n\n            let total = docs.get(\"total\").and_then(|v| v.as_u64()).unwrap_or(0);\n\n            if results.is_empty() {\n                has_more = false;\n                break;\n            }\n\n            // Write to target\n            self.node_client\n                .write_documents(\n                    &target_node_id,\n                    &target_node_address,\n                    &fetch_req.index_uid,\n                    results.clone(),\n                )\n                .await\n                .map_err(|e| {\n                    crate::error::MiroirError::Routing(format!(\n                        \"write failed for shard {}: {}\",\n                        shard_id, e\n                    ))\n                })?;\n\n            let count = results.len() as u64;\n            total_copied += count;\n\n            debug!(\n                addition_id = %addition_id,\n                shard_id = shard_id.0,\n                offset,\n                count,\n                total_copied,\n                total,\n                \"Synced page\"\n            );\n\n            // Check if we're done\n            has_more = (offset as u64 + count) < total;\n            offset += page_size;\n        }\n\n        // Mark shard as complete\n        let mut coord = self.coordinator.write().await;\n        coord\n            .shard_sync_complete(addition_id, shard_id, total_copied)\n            .map_err(|e| {\n                crate::error::MiroirError::Topology(format!(\n                    \"failed to mark shard complete: {}\",\n                    e\n                ))\n            })?;\n\n        info!(\n            addition_id = %addition_id,\n            shard_id = shard_id.0,\n            total_copied,\n            \"Shard sync complete\"\n        );\n\n        Ok(total_copied)\n    }\n\n    /// Check for sync timeout and fail additions that have exceeded the limit.\n    #[instrument(skip_all)]\n    pub async fn check_timeouts(&self) -> Result<()> {\n        let coord = self.coordinator.write().await;\n        let additions = coord.get_all_additions().clone();\n        drop(coord);\n\n        let timeout = Duration::from_secs(3600); // 1 hour default\n\n        for (addition_id, state) in additions {\n            if !matches!(state.phase, crate::group_addition::GroupAdditionPhase::Syncing) {\n                continue;\n            }\n\n            if let Some(started_at) = state.started_at {\n                if started_at.elapsed() > timeout {\n                    warn!(\n                        addition_id = %addition_id,\n                        group_id = state.group_id,\n                        \"Group addition sync timeout\"\n                    );\n\n                    let mut coord = self.coordinator.write().await;\n                    let _ = coord.fail_addition(\n                        addition_id,\n                        format!(\"sync timeout after {:?}\", timeout),\n                    );\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        Ok(())\n    }\n\n    /// Run the sync worker loop continuously.\n    pub async fn run(&self) -> Result<()> {\n        info!(\"Starting group sync worker\");\n\n        loop {\n            tokio::select! {\n                _ = tokio::time::sleep(self.config.sync_interval) => {\n                    if let Err(e) = self.sync_iteration().await {\n                        error!(\"Sync iteration failed: {}\", e);\n                    }\n\n                    if let Err(e) = self.check_timeouts().await {\n                        error!(\"Timeout check failed: {}\", e);\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n#[cfg(test)]\nmod tests {\n    use super::*;\n    use crate::group_addition::{GroupAdditionConfig, GroupAdditionCoordinator};\n    use crate::scatter::FetchDocumentsResponse;\n self.write_calls.write().await;\n            calls.push((node.clone(), index_uid.to_string(), documents));\n            Ok(())\n        }\n    }\n\n    #[tokio::test]\n    async fn Returns the new status on success.\n74\t    ///\n75\t    /// Legal transitions (plan §2 topology-change verbs):\n76\t    /// - (new) → Joining          (admin API: POST /_miroir/nodes)\n77\t    /// - Joining → Active         (migration complete)\n78\t    /// - Active → Draining        (admin API: POST /_miroir/nodes/{id}/drain)\n79\t    /// - Draining → Removed       (migration complete)\n80\t    /// - Active/Draining → Failed (health check detects failure)\n81\t    /// - Failed → Active          (health check recovery)\n82\t    /// - Active/Failed → Degraded (partial health: timeouts)\n83\t    /// - Degraded → Active        (health restored)\n84\t    pub fn transition_to(self, target: NodeStatus) -> Result<NodeStatus> {\n85\t        use NodeStatus::*;\n86\t\n87\t        let legal = match (self, target) {\n88\t            // Normal lifecycle\n89\t            (Joining, Active) => true,\n90\t            (Active, Draining) => true,\n91\t            (Draining, Removed) => true,\n92\t\n93\t            // Failure detection\n94\t            (Active, Failed) => true,\n95\t            (Draining, Failed) => true,\n96\t\n97\t            // Recovery\n98\t            (Failed, Active) => true,\n99\t\n100\t            // Degraded\n101\t            (Active, Degraded) => true,\n102\t            (Failed, Degraded) => true,\n103\t            (Degraded, Active) => true,\n104\t\n105\t            // Idempotent\n106\t            (Active, Active)\n107\t            | (Failed, Failed)\n108\t            | (Degraded, Degraded)\n109\t            | (Joining, Joining)\n110\t            | (Draining, Draining) => true,\n111\t\n112\t            // Healthy is an alias for Active in transitions\n113\t            (Healthy, _) | (_, Healthy) => false,\n114\t\n115\t            _ => false,\n116\t State of a replica group during group addition (plan §2).\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize, Default)]\n#[serde(rename_all = \"snake_case\")]\npub enum GroupState {\n    /// Group is being provisioned; queries NOT routed here.\n    #[default]\n    Initializing,\n    /// Group is fully synced and serving queries.\n    Active,\n}\n\n/// Health status of a node, with state-machine transitions.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize, Default)]\n#[serde(rename_all = \"snake_case\")]\npub enum NodeStatus {\n    /// Node is healthy and serving traffic.\n    #[default]\n    Healthy,\n    /// Node is degraded (timeouts, not full disconnect) but still serving.\n    Degraded,\n    /// Node is draining — graceful shutdown, still serves shards it owns.\n    Draining,\n    /// Node has failed (unplanned outage).\n    Failed,\n    /// Node is joining the cluster (being provisioned).\n    Joining,\n    /// Node is active — fully operational after joining.\n    Active,\n    /// Node has been removed from the cluster.\n    Removed,\n}\n\nimpl NodeStatus {\n    /// Attempt a state transition. Returns the new status on success.\n    ///\n    /// Legal transitions (plan §2 topology-change verbs):\n    /// - (new) → Joining          (admin API: POST /_miroir/nodes)\n    /// - Joining → Active         (migration complete)\n    /// - Active → Draining        (admin API: POST /_miroir/nodes/{id}/drain)\n    /// - Draining → Removed       (migration complete)\n    /// - Active/Draining → Failed (health check detects failure)\n    /// - Failed → Active          (health check recovery)\n    /// - Active/Failed → Degraded (partial health: timeouts)\n    /// - Degraded → Active        (health restored)\n    pub fn transition_to(self, target: NodeStatus) -> Result<NodeStatus> {\n        use NodeStatus::*;\n\n        let legal = match (self, target) {\n            // Normal lifecycle\n            (Joining, Active) => true,\n            (Active, Draining) => true,\n            (Draining, Removed) => true,\n\n            // Failure detection\n            (Active, Failed) => true,\n            (Draining, Failed) => true,\n\n            // Recovery\n            (Failed, Active) => true,\n\n            // Degraded\n            (Active, Degraded) => true,\n            (Failed, Degraded) => true,\n            (Degraded, Active) => true,\n\n            // Idempotent\n            (Active, Active)\n            | (Failed, Failed)\n            | (Degraded, Degraded)\n            | (Joining, Joining)\n            | (Draining, Draining) => true,\n\n            // Healthy is an alias for Active in transitions\n            (Healthy, _) | (_, Healthy) => false,\n\n            _ => false,\n        };\n\n        if legal {\n            Ok(target)\n        } else {\n            Err(MiroirError::Topology(format!(\n                \"illegal state transition: {:?} → {:?}\",\n                self, target\n            )))\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// Check if a node in this status is serving reads.\n    pub fn is_readable(self) -> bool {\n        matches!(\n            self,\n            NodeStatus::Active | NodeStatus::Healthy | NodeStatus::Degraded | NodeStatus::Draining\n        )\n    }\n\n    /// Check if a node in this status can accept any writes unconditionally.\n    pub fn is_active(self) -> bool {\n        matches!(self, NodeStatus::Active | NodeStatus::Healthy | NodeStatus::Degraded)\n    }","numLines":100,"startLine":40,"totalLines":1215}}}

healthy node, using cache if within TTL.\n91\t    pub async fn get_version(&self) -> Result<String, StatusCode> {\n92\t        // Check cache first\n93\t        {\n94\t            let cache = self.version_cache.read().await;\n95\t            let last_update = self.last_cache_update.read().await;\n96\t            if let (Some(ref cached), Some(last)) = (cache.as_ref(), last_update.as_ref()) {\n97\t                if last.elapsed().as_secs() < self.cache_ttl_secs {\n98\t                    return Ok((**cached).clone());\n99\t                }\n100\t            }\n101\t        }\n102\t\n103\t        // Cache miss or expired - fetch from a node\n104\t        let client = Client::builder()\n105\t            .timeout(Duration::from_secs(2))\n106\t            .build()\n107\t            .map_err(|_| StatusCode::INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR)?;\n108\t\n109\t        for address in &self.node_addresses {\n110\t            let url = format!(\"{}/version\", Local Rate Limiter (for single-pod deployments)\n135\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n136\t\n137\t/// In-memory rate limiter for admin login (local backend only).\n138\t/// Thread-safe using Arc<Mutex<...>>.\n139\t#[derive(Debug, Clone)]\n140\tpub struct LocalAdminRateLimiter {\n141\t    inner: of recent requests (for sliding window)\n153\t    request_timestamps_ms: Vec<i64>,\n154\t    /// Consecutive failed login attempts\n155\t    failed_count: u32,\n156\t    /// Unix timestamp (ms) when
